title: Christmas Morning Breakfast Casserole
ingredients: 4-6 slices of white bread (depends on size of bread slices)
1 pound bulk sausage (spicy or regular), browned and drained
instructions: Tear up bread slices into pieces.
Put eggs, milk, dry mustard, salt and pepper in blender and blend until well combined.
Pour egg mixture over bread mixture in pan.
Bake at 350 degrees F for 35-40 minutes.
notes: Make the night before and place in refrigerator to bake in the morning.
Serve with ketchup if your Dad is there.
